de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface SpecificationElement

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    BlockContract, ClassInvariant, Contract, DependencyContract, FunctionalOperationContract, InformationFlowContract, InitiallyClause, LoopInvariant, OperationContract
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BlockWellDefinedness, ClassAxiom, ClassAxiomImpl, ClassInvariantImpl, ClassWellDefinedness, ContractAxiom, DependencyContractImpl, FunctionalOperationContractImpl, InformationFlowContractImpl, InitiallyClauseImpl, LoopInvariantImpl, LoopWellDefinedness, MethodWellDefinedness, ModelMethodExecution, PartialInvAxiom, QueryAxiom, RepresentsAxiom, SimpleBlockContract, StatementWellDefinedness, WellDefinednessCheck

    public interface SpecificationElement
    Common superinterface of all constructs created by the specification language front ends and managed by SpecificationRepository.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getDisplayName()
      Returns the displayed name.
      KeYJavaType getKJT()
      Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.
      String getName()
      Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.
      VisibilityModifier getVisibility()
      Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.

        String getDisplayName()

      • getVisibility

        VisibilityModifier getVisibility()
        Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)

      • getKJT

        Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.
